title: Indian-Style Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread recipe infused with Indian spices, perfect for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Sprinkle both sides of the flatbread with masala and a pinch of salt.
If using soy sauce, brush it on one side of the flatbread.
Cook the flatbread for 1-2 minutes on the first side, until it starts to puff up.
Flip the flatbread and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until it's crispy and golden.
